title: Mistress Mouse and the Construction Site Race
summary: Mistress Mouse is the hero of the mouse world, whether she's dominating the racetrack or rescuing friends in need. In a high-stakes race around a busy construction site, she outmaneuvers Victor Mouse and his bananamobile, navigating around a massive steamroller to take the lead. Her skills are put to the test again when a group of friends, including Oscar and Alfie, drive too fast and find themselves stuck in a deep mud puddle. With her trusty pink tow truck and a powerful tow hitch, Mistress Mouse pulls every car to safety, proving that no mud puddle is too deep for her to handle.

highlightQuote.text: Okay, I'll hold it on the windowsill so it can have blueberries.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, well. Here, let me get it set up. I'll show you.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dad, I need the chopper!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, we've we used my flashlight.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, mine! I don't need your phone.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. I think it's in here. There it is. There it is.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: But the light is not working well. I think the battery is too low. So the light keeps turning off. So that's why I use my flashlight instead, because that stays on.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Okay, I'll hold it on the windowsill so it can have blueberries.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. So now I can use your light because... Here, let me just put that on there. All right. Now turn off the lamp. Now, Iz. It's getting close to time to go to sleep. So we can do one story, I think.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: How about...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You want to get in bed?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Two stories.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, two short stories.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I do need two short stories, Dad.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay. Let's play Izzy the kiddo.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, I want to do one about Mistress Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. Um, where's Mistress Mouse going to be in this story? Is she on an adventure?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, she's in a race.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, in a race. What kind of race?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: A driving race.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. And who is she racing against?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, maybe she's racing against Winnie the Pooh?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, Winnie the Pooh is not in this story about Mistress Mouse. She is in... Mistress Mouse was racing against Victor!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, what kind of a car does Victor drive?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: He drives a yellow and blue car.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A yellow and blue car. Oh. What kind of a car is it, like a race car or a regular car or a bus or a truck?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's a... bananamobile.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Victor drives a bananamobile. Wow, that sounds like a good car to enter into a race. Okay, let's pick one more mouse that's also in the race.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Data Mouse. He was driving a little... carrot car.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Data Mouse is... Okay, let's see. So we've got Mistress Mouse in her tow truck, right?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Victor Mouse in his bananamobile, and Data Mouse in the carrot car. What color carrot car is it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's an orange carrot car.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Of course, an orange carrot car. And today is the big race, says the announcer. And we're going to race around... What are they going to race around?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The... No, no, they're going to drive around something.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah, what is it that they're going to drive around?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They're going to drive around the construction site.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Today's race, says the announcer, is around the construction site with cranes and bulldozers and diggers digging big holes. On your marks, get set, start your engines! And Mistress Mouse starts her tow truck, "vroom," and Data Mouse starts his carrotmobile, "vroom," and Victor Mouse starts his bananamobile, "vroom." And the announcer says, "And go!" And then, zoom, all three mice race their cars away. Vroom, vroom, vroom. And who is in the lead first?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Mistress Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Mistress Mouse pulls into the lead, says the announcer. And she approaches the first turn. Everyone has to turn around the edge of the construction site where there's a big steamroller flattening the dirt. And the steamroller is going "bshhh," flattening the dirt. And oh no, the steamroller's on the racecourse! It's in the way. What are our race car drivers going to do? And Mistress Mouse slams on the brake, "errrt," and then she turns her car just in time to avoid the steamroller. But then Victor Mouse in his bananamobile steps on his brake too, "errrt," and he has to turn the other way around the steamroller and he drives right into the construction site. Oh no! Crash, boom, crash, bang! He's swerving through the dirt. And he bonks into a digger, "bonk," and he bonks into a bulldozer, "bonk." And all the truck drivers in the construction site are beeping their horns, "beep, beep, beep." You're supposed to be in the race, not the construction site. And Data Mouse in his carrot car slows way down, "errrt," and he almost stops. And he says, "Hmm, I better drive around this steamroller." And so he does. And then what happens?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then the announcer says, "Mistress Mouse is pulling well into the lead because of the steamroller that she managed to drive around." And so Mistress Mouse drives almost all the way around the construction site, but then, ta-da-da-da, Victor Mouse pulls out onto the racetrack, having cut right through the construction site! He made his own shortcut. And his car is all covered in dirt and mud and banged up with dents from driving through the construction site. But he pulls right onto the racecourse. Ta-da! But he's right behind Mistress Mouse, hot on her tail. Vroom, vroom, vroom, and they're almost at the finish line. And Data Mouse in his... Wait, he's the one in the carrot car, right?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: He speeds up again, "vroom," and tries to catch up. And vroom, vroom, vroom, vroom, and he pulls up behind Victor Mouse. And now it's a close three-way race as they are almost at the finish line. And Victor Mouse's bananamobile is spraying dirt everywhere as he goes faster and faster. And Mistress Mouse is pulling ahead inch by inch. Vroom, vroom, vroom, vroom, and she's still in the lead. And they're all getting so close to the finish line. And then what happened?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then Mistress Mouse roars across the finish line, "vroom!" And Data Mouse and Victor Mouse, "vroom, vroom," they come past just behind her. And the race is over, and the winner is Mistress Mouse by a nose.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And one more.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, one more story? Okay, what's this story going to be about?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's going to be about Mistress Mouse again and her love pink tow truck.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, and this time she's going to fix something, but it's not a car. It's something else. Which...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, it's not! It is a car.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, she's going to fix a car. What's wrong with the car this time?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Whose car is broken down?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Hmm. Is it yours car or Goldbug's car or...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, it's not yours car! It's... it's her friend Mistress Mouse... No, it's her friend Oscar's car.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, what kind of car does Oscar drive?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: He drives a green car.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that's a nice color car for Oscar. And um, is it a big car or a little car?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's a medium car. And Alfie has a brown car. And Alfie and other mice, and all the other mice have their cars stuck.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They're all stuck? Why are they all stuck?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Because... because they were driving too fast.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, they were all driving too fast and they went crash! And now they're all stuck in a jumble. And Oscar said, "Wait a minute, everybody. We better call Mistress Mouse. If anybody can fix our cars, it's her." And so Mistress Mouse picks up the phone. "Hello?" And what does Oscar Mouse say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: "We need our cars pulled out."

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: "Pulled out? What happened?" says Mistress Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: "We were driving too fast."

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: "Oh, well, I see. I'm sorry to hear that. Um, where is everyone stuck?" says Mistress Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: "We were... we are stuck in the... in some mud."

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: "Oh, you're stuck in the mud. I'm so sorry to hear that. I'll be over right away," says Mistress Mouse. And she hangs up the phone and jumps in her truck and starts it up, "vroom," and she drives over to the big mud puddle. And lo and behold, she sees a big pile of little cars stuck in the mud. And right in the front is a little green car, and there's... um... a little nose and little green ears poking out and a little green tail. And she says, "Oh..."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And there's other ones, too.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And there's lots of other cars too, including a brown car that Alfie drives and all the other mice cars. And she says, "That must be Oscar's car and Alfie's car in the front there. I'll go talk to them."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And all the others.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And all... yes, I'll talk to all the others and I'll pull them out one by one. So whose car did she pull out first?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, she's not here yet.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, she's still driving to the mud puddle. And then, vroom, vroom, vroom, she gets there.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then what does she do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: She stops her truck and she goes and walks over to Oscar and says, "Well, I..."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And all the other mice.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And all the other mice. And she says, "I see your problem, Oscar and all the other mice. I'll pull out your car, Oscar, and I'll pull out all the other mice cars too."

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, please please that band alone... I need that to get into the hospital to see Avery. We can't rip that. Okay, thank you. And she says, "Just a moment, let me get started." And she backs her truck, "beep, beep, beep," up to the mud puddle and she hitches her tow truck right onto the back of Oscar's car, "clunk." And then she gets back in her truck, "vroom, vroom, vroom, vroom," and she lifts up Oscar's car out of the mud and it goes "schloooop."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And all the other cars.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then she pulls out all the other cars too. And then all the other cars are rescued from being stuck in the mud. The end.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, now it's diaper time.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But first I have to use the potty.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You do? Okay.

characters.name: Mistress Mouse
characters.description: A polite three-year-old mouse and resourceful shopkeeper, this community cornerstone balances a bold artistic spirit with sharp mechanical grit. Whether crafting intricate Lego creations in her sunroom or piloting her signature pink tow truck to solve puzzles and assist neighbors, she is a master of the road and a multi-talented creator. From famously adorning cars with blue stripes to dominating the race track, her inventive soul is always on the move. Usually seen in a mushroom-adorned cardboard hat with an orange sparkle purse, this resourceful driver remains an essential, evocative fixture of every neighborhood adventure.

characters.name: Victor Mouse
characters.description: A daring racer who pilots a vibrant yellow and blue bananamobile through the muddiest shortcuts, this mouse is fueled by a fastidious and singular ambition. Every victory brings him closer to fulfilling an incredibly long, exacting manifest of acquisitions, ranging from tailored velvet waistcoats to mahogany bureaus and gilded parlor trim.

characters.name: Data Mouse
characters.description: A mouse racer who drives an orange carrot car and participates in the big construction site race.

characters.name: Oscar
characters.description: Hunkered in velvety shadows beside one of Mistress Mouse’s tattered stuffy mice, Lily’s brother illuminates a salvaged television with a scavenged flashlight, contentedly nibbling on oily debris. His focus drifts from the flickering screen to the miniature green car mired in a mud puddle—a casualty of the same reckless speed he employs when racing his yellow school bus. Between these high-stakes heats, he engineers sturdy Lego bridges that arch over the surrounding wreckage, all under the unblinking watch of his glass-eyed, plush sentinel.

characters.name: Alfie
characters.description: Lily’s brother, a bold infant residing in the hospital, has entered the big race behind the wheel of a heavy-duty pink tow truck. Having recently survived a thick, muddy pile-up alongside Oscar that sidelined his mouse companion’s miniature brown car, the baby now maneuvers his vibrant new rig through the ward with a champion's intent.

places.name: Construction Site
places.description: Just down the block, a skeletal labyrinth of towering cranes and idling bulldozers serves as a high-octane arena where mice compete in blurring, high-speed races. This mechanical sanctuary is the domain of Whopper the digger, where the air hums with the scent of grease and the frantic adrenaline of the tiny circuit.

places.name: Mud Puddle
places.description: A treacherous, messy spot where several mice get their cars stuck in a jumble.
